latest.title: US and Iran exchange strikes and accuse each other of violating ceasefire
latest.summary: Iran says it has launched retaliatory attacks at US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain after the US said it hit multiple targets across Iran.

latest.title: I hear my son crying beneath the rubble, says Venezuela earthquake survivor
latest.summary: Andreina Valerio says she fears for her son, who is trapped with her partner and in-laws beneath a collapsed building.

latest.title: Tech firms are blaming AI for mega device and console price rises
latest.summary: Xbox consoles, Nintendo's new Switch 2 and Valve's Steam Deck are just some of the gadgets seeing price hikes in recent months.

latest.title: U.S. military attacks Iranian targets after commercial tanker hit in the Strait of Hormuz
latest.summary: The attacks come as the United States and Iran are supposed to be engaging in a 60-day ceasefire as they attempt to work toward a resolution.
